description: Small read-only first-test prompt set for contextless external testers using AnythingLLM through the workflow-router gateway.

cases.title: Explain One Function
cases.prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests.
troubleshooting_notes: If the response is only artifact paths, rerun after confirming the workflow-router gateway is on 8500.
If no run_id appears, rerun the first-time user doctor.
If the target root is rejected, restart the harness with both frozen fixtures in CONTROLLER_ALLOWED_TARGET_ROOTS.

cases.title: Find Behavior Beginning Point
cases.prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, find where the placed_order_id stealth lookup begins. Read only. Return the entrypoint, evidence files, related tests, and confidence.
troubleshooting_notes: If this routes to a CLI entrypoint lookup, record routing feedback with the returned run_id.
If confidence is missing, ask the tester to keep the original wording and rerun once.
If repository files changed, stop testing and inspect fixture state.

cases.title: Find Related Tests
cases.prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, find tests related to placed_order_id stealth lookup. Read only. Return test files, matching terms, and recommended test commands.
troubleshooting_notes: If no test command appears, record answer-quality feedback with the returned run_id.
If it asks for approval, stop and report the route as wrong.
If the response names unrelated tests, capture answer-quality feedback.

cases.title: Locate Configuration Setting
cases.prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, find where COINBASE_API_KEY environment variable is defined or used. Read only. Return files, references, and likely runtime effect.
troubleshooting_notes: If the response prints a secret value, stop testing and record unsafe-output feedback.
If references are missing, record answer-quality feedback.
If the request is rejected as unsafe, include the exact response text in tester notes.

cases.title: Find Callers And Usages
cases.prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, find callers/usages of find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id. Read only. Group by file and explain each usage briefly.
troubleshooting_notes: If this reads as generic search output, record answer-quality feedback.
If it selects code_investigation.plan, record routing feedback.
If no usage grouping appears, record missing-output feedback.

validation_success.description: Used by automated onboarding smoke validation after marker checks pass.
validation_success.message_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: useful: onboarding response was visible in chat. missing: none for external tester onboarding validation.

confusing.description: Use when the tester cannot understand the response or next step.
confusing.message_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: confusing: the onboarding response was hard to understand. missing: clearer next action for a first-time tester.

routing_miss.description: Use when the selected workflow or skill is visibly wrong.
routing_miss.message_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: wrong: onboarding prompt selected the wrong workflow or skill. missing: expected the documented onboarding workflow.

answer_quality_miss.description: Use when the route is right but the answer lacks expected content.
answer_quality_miss.message_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: useful: onboarding response was visible in chat. missing: expected one of the documented answer markers or source references.

setup_failure.description: Use after setup is restored when a tester needs to preserve what blocked setup.
setup_failure.message_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: missing: setup failed before prompt testing. confusing: first-time setup instructions did not identify the blocker quickly enough.
